data.name: 社畜魅魔
data.detailed_description:
故事

在人類與魔法、魔力共存的世界。

原本是人類的咲姬，卻在某一天突然變成了魅魔。由於社會普遍認為魅魔都是淫亂且低俗的生物，咲姬原本已經到手的錄取通知書也因此被取消，她的生活也變得十分艱難。

經歷波折後，她終於以魅魔的身份進入了一家名為『魅魔第一產業』的公司開始工作，但入職的喜悅卻沒能持續多久。

據說一旦完不成業績目標，就會被強制派往勞動環境如地獄般嚴酷的『外部營業所』！？

在以現代社會為背景的魅魔公司裏，初出茅廬的小魅魔咲姬，即將上演一場黑心企業的生存模擬大戲！！！

遊戲玩法

為了獲取精氣並完成公司業績指標，玩家需要操控咲姬去『接待』各種客人。沒錯，就是那種色色的『接待』。

但由於咲姬原本是人類，不僅笨拙，而且毫無技巧，所以她必須通過完成各種任務，積累資源——『魔力』與『經驗指數』，來提升自己。

學習各種技能，推進每日日程安排，能做的工作將逐漸增加，接待的客人也會越來越多。

當然，H事件也會隨之逐步解鎖！

請幫助咲姬學會各種技能，努力推進每日的日程，讓她成長為一名出色的社畜與魅魔吧！

遊戲特色

  • 基礎CG 34張，差分CG 578張

  • 利用公休日與技能解鎖超過44種豐富多彩的H事件場景！

  • 根據一年內的達成度觸發多重結局

  • 遊戲時長約7小時

  • 附帶CG全解鎖功能

data.short_description: 在人類與魔法、魔力共存的世界。原本是人類的咲姬，卻在某一天突然變成了魅魔。在以現代社會為背景的魅魔公司裏，初出茅廬的小魅魔咲姬，即將上演一場黑心企業的生存模擬大戲！！！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Corporate Slave Succubus
data.detailed_description:
STORY

In a world where humans, magic, and mana coexist—

Saki, originally human, suddenly finds herself transformed into a succubus.

Widely viewed by society as lustful and indecent beings, succubi face harsh discrimination.

Saki’s previously secured job offer is rescinded, plunging her into a difficult daily life.

Eventually, she manages to land a position at the "Succubus Primary Industry," finally starting her new career.

But her joy is short-lived.

She learns that failing to meet performance quotas will result in forced transfer to an "external branch," infamous for its hellish working conditions!?

In this succubus-themed company set against a modern backdrop, rookie succubus Saki struggles to survive—

Welcome to the Black Company Survival Simulation!

GAMEPLAY

To fulfill her company's energy quotas, players control Saki as she "services" various customers.

Yes, by "service," we mean exactly what you think.

However, as a former human, Saki is inexperienced and clumsy, lacking the necessary seductive skills.

Thus, she must undertake various tasks to gather resources—mana and experience—and continuously develop herself.

By learning diverse skills and managing her daily schedule wisely, Saki’s available tasks expand gradually, and she can handle more demanding clients.

Naturally, new erotic events unlock accordingly!

Help Saki acquire new skills and carefully plan her schedule each day, guiding her growth into both a successful corporate slave and a talented succubus!

FEATURES

  • 34 Base CGs, with 578 variations.

  • Over 44 diverse erotic scenarios.

  • Multiple endings depending on your performance throughout one in-game year.

  • Total playtime approx. 7 hours.

  • Unlock-all-content switch included.
